---
title: Home
menu: 
  main:
weight: -1
output: md_document
--- 
   
##### About

<img style="float: right; padding-left: 7%; padding-bottom: 7%; padding-top: 5%;" src="/images/me2.png" width="330"/>
 
I am a Postdoctoral Research Associate at the Department of Epidemiology and Biostatistics, part of the [MRC Centre for Environment and Health](https://www.environment-health.ac.uk/) at Imperial College London. My group is the [Environmental and Health Statistics group](https://sites.google.com/view/envstats/home) headed by [Professor Marta Blangiardo](https://www.imperial.ac.uk/people/m.blangiardo). 

Before that, Ι did my PhD in Statistics at the [Department of Mathematical Sciences](https://www.bath.ac.uk/departments/department-of-mathematical-sciences/) at the University of Bath supervised by [Dr Theresa Smith](https://people.bath.ac.uk/trs35/). Also, I obtained an Mmath in in Mathematics at the University of Leicester.


My current domain of research is on Bayesian spatiotemporal models using survey data. I combine the aforementioned modelling framework with mental health 
outcomes to investigate the effect of govermenent policy in the England. This is a Wellcome Trust funded project in collaboration with [Professor Gianluca Baio](http://www.statistica.it/gianluca/) and [Professor James Kirkbride](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/psychiatry/people/james-kirkbride) at UCL and [Dr Sara Geneletti](https://www.lse.ac.uk/statistics/people/sara-geneletti) at LSE.

<br>

##### Education

* **2022** -- PhD in Statistics, University of Bath
* **2018** -- Mmath in Mathematics, University of Leicester

##### Research visits

* **2023** -- Norwegian University of Science and Technology to [Professor Andrea Riebler](https://folk.ntnu.no/andrerie/) 
* **2021** -- University of Washington to [Professor Jon Wakefiled](https://faculty.washington.edu/jonno/)
